name: Talkweb Information System Co.,Ltd.
summary: Talkweb Information System Co.,Ltd. provides online education and mobile games in China and internationally. It offers Internet-based education services for 0-18 year olds. The company also operates preschool education institutions; and primary schools and middle schools that offer learning management system and personalized learning system, including learning, homework, exams, and assessments, as well as personalized after-school learning services. It has approximately 15000 partnered kindergartens; and 25000 primary and middle schools. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.
